Many people have sensitive teeth. When enamel is worn away or gums recede, the dentine underneath becomes exposed. This can lead to tooth sensitivity, for example with cold and hot food and drinks.

When used after proper brushing and flossing, Colgate Plax mouthwash helps deliver a plaque-control system. It works to further rid the mouth of bacteria that may linger on the tongue and inner cheeks, and helps stop new plaque from forming on and between teeth, as well as just below the gum-line. What is bad breath? Bad breath, also known as Halitosis, is foul-smelling breath.
What causes bad breath? Bad breath (halitosis) can be caused by a number of things including poor oral hygiene, the foods you eat (garlic and onions, in particular), smoking, alcohol, gum disease, diabetes, dry mouth, sinus or throat infections and gastrointestinal issues.
Top 3 ways to treat bad breath:
  1. Brush teeth twice a day with a fluoride toothpaste and floss daily.
  2. Use a tongue scraper to eliminate odour-causing bacteria on the tongue.
  3. Visit the dentist twice a year for cleanings and checkups.

Mouthwash for bad breath: Colgate Plax provides a cooling sensation that lasts 10X longer than brushing alone and offers 24/7 bad breath control, with twice daily use.

long_description:
Smell sexy and confident throughout the day with Rexona's Sexy Bouquet antiperspirant deodorant for women, available in a 50mL aerosol format. Get 48 hour wetness protection with this easy to carry package. Our products are intelligently designed to work as hard as you do. We make it our business to know more about sweat, and what we learn informs every product innovation. Sweat, also known as perspiration, is a normal and healthy bodily function and it starts to occur just a few months after birth. We mainly sweat to cool our bodies down, a process called thermoregulation. Our brain sends a signal to over 3 million glands in our body to release sweat (a clear fluid made of water, salts and proteins). As this fluid evaporates from our skin, it lowers our body temperature. On https://www.rexona.com/au you'll find lots of helpful information about how to stop sweat and how Rexona can help. Rexona entered the world of professional sports, backing some of the world's best sports men and women. To this day, Rexona continues to provide ultimate protection at even the busiest of times. Rexona was created in Australia in 1908 by Mrs Alice Sheffer, the wife of SF Sheffer, the founder of the Sheldon Drug Company. A talented physician, she wanted to give people a new kind of personal care product, with effective ingredients that also smelt good. When Rexona hit the shelves in 1908, it soon became the company's biggest seller

name: Men Deodorant 48hr Aerosol Original Travel Pack
description: REXONA MEN DEODORANT 48HR AEROSOL ORIGINAL TRAVEL PACK 50ML
long_description:
The sleek and easy to carry 50mL design of Rexona's Original antiperspirant for men is formulated for 48 hour wetness protection and all day long odour control. Leaving you feeling dry and fresh throughout the day. Our products are intelligently designed to work as hard as you do. We make it our business to know more about sweat, and what we learn informs every product innovation. Sweat, also known as perspiration, is a normal and healthy bodily function and it starts to occur just a few months after birth. We mainly sweat to cool our bodies down, a process called thermoregulation. Our brain sends a signal to over 3 million glands in our body to release sweat (a clear fluid made of water, salts and proteins). As this fluid evaporates from our skin, it lowers our body temperature. On https://www.rexona.com/au you'll find lots of helpful information about how to stop sweat and how Rexona can help. Rexona entered the world of professional sports, backing some of the world's best sports men and women. To this day, Rexona continues to provide ultimate protection at even the busiest of times. Rexona was created in Australia in 1908 by Mrs Alice Sheffer, the wife of SF Sheffer, the founder of the Sheldon Drug Company. A talented physician, she wanted to give people a new kind of personal care product, with effective ingredients that also smelt good. When Rexona hit the shelves in 1908, it soon became the company's biggest seller
  • 48 hour antiperspirant

  • With motion activated protection

  • With antibacterial protection

  • Long lasting protection against wetness

  • Alcohol* free (*ethyl alcohol)

  • Long lasting protection against odour.

name: Rapid Acting Hayfever Allergy Relief Antihistamine Mini Tablets
long_description:
Zyrtec Rapid Acting 24 hour Hayfever Allergy Relief Antihistamine Mini Tablets relieve hayfever allergy symptoms and are small and easy to swallow.

When your immune system takes offence to an outside particle or substance, your body produces antibodies to attack this normally harmless substance by releasing a chemical called histamine.

Zyrtec contains the active ingredient, cetirizine, which helps to block the production of histamines to relieve symptoms of hayfever allergies. Cetirizine is part of a class of medications called antihistamines.

Zyrtec Hayfever Allergy Mini Tablets provide fast powerful 24 hour relief of hayfever allergy symptoms, including:
- Sneezing
- Runny, itchy nose
- Red, itchy and watery eyes
- Post nasal drip

Zyrtec is effective against seasonal hayfever triggers, such as:
- Grass Pollen
- Tree Pollen
- Weed Pollen
  • 5 Mini Tablets

name: Knife Sharpener
long_description:
Knife Sharpener. Features a wolfram steel sharpening wheel and a ceramic honing wheel. Compact design for easy storage. Non slip base. Easy to use - just place the sharpener on a flat surface and hold it firmly with your non-dominant hand
and hold the knife by the handle using a firm grip.
If your knife has a dull edge, begin using the coarse metal
sharpening wheel. Align the knife in the sharpening slot starting
at the heel of the blade. Keeping the knife in a vertical position,
pull the knife towards you taking care not to use too much force.
Continue this process 10 times. Wipe the blade with a towel.
Move on to the honing phase using the ceramic sharpening
wheel to refine the edge and to remove any burrs.
Place the knife in the ceramic sharpening slot and repeat the
sharpening process. Continue this process 10 times.
Once you are done, wash the knife in warm soapy water.
Test your knife for sharpness using a tomato.
Repeat the process above until you have achieved
your desired level of sharpness.
To maintain the sharpness of your knife, repeat the
process above from time to time.
  • Features a wolfram steel sharpening wheel and a ceramic honing wheel.

  • Compact design for easy storage.

  • Non slip base.

name: Scented Candle Pine & Spanish Sage
description: BOTANICA ORIGINS SCENTED CANDLE PINE & SPANISH SAGE 1 EACH
long_description:
In the sun-drenched hills of southern Spain, wild Spanish sage flourishes under the watchful eye of generations of foragers. Just beyond, towering pines release their crisp, resinous scent into the Mediterranean breeze. 

 

These essential oils are harvested at their aromatic peak, capturing the essence of the rugged landscape. Spanish sage brings a soft herbal clarity, whilst pine adds a cool, grounding freshness-together creating a scent that's pure, invigorating, and deeply rooted in nature.Let Botanica Origins candles reset the mood and deliver aromatic fragrances for up to 50 hours. 

 

Our fragrances are crafted with a deep respect for nature sourcing pine and sage from sustainable, local practices. We use pine twigs and needles left over from timber harvesting, repurposing them into pine oil which reduces transport emissions and waste. 

  • Fragrance profile: Aromatic, woody, floral, Pine

  • Fragrance infused with responsibly sourced natural ingredients

  • Lasts for up to 50 hours

  • Free from added dyes

  • Botanica is a proud supporter of WWF Australia. Together for Nature Regeneration in Australia.
